goal: 重写 README 定位并弱化 Codex 绑定后直接推送 main

summary.title: 弱化 Codex 绑定并重写 idea-miner 定位
summary.what: 重写 README，使 idea-miner 以通用 agent idea mining workflow 呈现；同步调整 scheduled-run prompt、安装脚本文案、默认 evidence store 变量和 workflow 参考文档。
summary.why: 用户希望 README 如实描述 automatic startup idea generator 的产品方向，同时减少“是 X 不是 Y”的防御式表述，并把 Codex 降为现成适配层而不是核心定位。
summary.user_goal: 重写 README 定位并弱化 Codex 绑定后直接推送 main

decisions.chose: 用 agent-neutral 的 automatic startup and open-source idea mining 叙事重写 README
decisions.rationale: 核心能力是把公开信号自动整理成候选 idea、竞品上下文和验证计划，适合直接描述为 agent workflow。
rejected: 继续使用 not an automatic startup idea generator 的防御式开场

decisions.chose: 保留 Codex 作为 Quick Start 和 scheduled-run prompt 的现成适配，核心叙事统一改为 agent/runtime/host environment
decisions.rationale: 当前自动化 prompt 和默认 skills 目录仍服务 Codex，但 skill 方法本身可以被其他 agent runtime 复用。
rejected: 完全删除 Codex 适配信息
继续把 Codex 写成核心运行主体

decisions.chose: 新增 IDEA_MINER_HOME 作为主环境变量，默认目录改为 ~/.idea-miner，并保留 CODEX_IDEA_DISCOVERY_HOME 兼容旧安装
decisions.rationale: 数据目录不应绑定到单一 agent 平台；旧环境变量保留可降低迁移成本。

review_notes: 用户明确要求直接 push main；本次提交在 main 上完成。

architectural_claims: idea-miner core workflow is agent-runtime neutral; Codex is documented as an adapter and default install target.
Scheduled runs should keep scheduling in the host environment and keep prompts focused on source preferences, exclusions, and output expectations.
Local evidence memory is a generic idea-miner store with legacy Codex environment-variable fallback.
behavioral_changes: README now presents idea-miner as automatic startup and open-source idea mining for agents.
install-local.mjs and init-store.mjs resolve data directories via IDEA_MINER_HOME, then CODEX_IDEA_DISCOVERY_HOME, then ~/.idea-miner.
Workflow docs and prompts refer to host-specific control blocks instead of heartbeat XML.

data_model_changes.name: local evidence store default location
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Existing installs can keep using CODEX_IDEA_DISCOVERY_HOME or pass --data-dir to keep the old store location.

security_implications: Runtime data and private automation material remain documented as out-of-repository local data.
migration_notes: Default store path changed from a Codex-specific path to ~/.idea-miner when no data-dir or environment variable is set.
